series_metadata.series_title: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
series_metadata.series_description: Documents stating descriptions of lease payments and other pertinent information on buildings or land rented by agency.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Fulfill the requirements of ORC 117.49. Retain 2 yrs after expiration of lease, then destroy. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Fulfill the requirements of ORC 117.49. Retain 2 yrs after expiration of lease, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
